description: decay.net_tendency.half_life → 12: Net tendency decay is completely untested; aggressive reduction from 24mo to 12mo will weight recent net-approach patterns more heavily to capture tactical adaptation on hard courts where serve-and-volley tendencies and net positioning shift rapidly, targeting the unexamined temporal weighting in approach-shot discrimination that remains masked after 18 consecutive experiments across other decay, confidence, cluster, and window categories.
